subcodes.first_line: O Abu'l-Qásim! We have perused thy letter and hearkened unto the sighing of thy heart in separation from thy Lord, and have discerned that which thou didst intend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالقاسم شاهدنا کتابک و سمعنا حنین قلبک فی فراق مولاک و عرفنا ما اردته من
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment
